features: Go release assets: automatic cross-compilation for 6 OS/arch targets
GitHub Releases API integration for asset upload (no gh CLI needed)
--checksums flag generates SHA256 checksums.txt for all release assets
--no-assets flag to skip automatic Go binary compilation
--targets flag for custom cross-compile target selection
Improved gitmap ls output with labeled fields and inline cd examples
Shell completion for release, release-branch, group, multi-group, and list commands
Fixed duplicate hints in gitmap ls <type> output
